title: selaginella parkeri
intro: Selaginella parkeri, also known as the Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen spikemoss, a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella parkeri include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Selaginella parkeri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
